name: Neolara Corp.
business: Neolara Corp. is a development-stage construction company providing turnkey construction, design and build, and general contractor services. It primarily uses coconut fiber concrete technology for lightweight concrete. The company currently operates in Costa Rica and plans to expand to other countries.

exposures.sentence: Neolara Corp. is a construction and architectural company that provide s services including General Contractor, Design & Consultant, Design & Build, Construction Project Management and Turnkey Construction of various types of buildings (private houses, high-rise buildings, shopping centers, non-residential premises etc.).
We plan to build not only residential but also commercial real estate: Private houses, high-rise buildings, flats, apartments, farm houses - these are the largely sold residential properties.
The cooperation will include non-exclusive collaboration in areas such as material construction, service development, and potential distribution of environmentally sustainable concrete mixtures.

catalysts.sentence: On April 11, 2025, Neolara Corp. entered into a Cooperation Agreement with Lorittini LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company.
